text:
"FALL in STAR" is a song by Kotono Mitsuishi. It was published on the album Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack. https://vgmdb.net/album/22384 

It was originally recorded for the 1992 arrangement album Lilia~from Ys~ dedicated to the Ys video game series. https://vgmdb.net/album/4584

On a night like this, I'm alone
Milk Tea and Cushion
A secret, if no one is watching
Climbing quietly onto the roof

You might even be able to see Jupiter's rings.
Hey, look

Gazing at the white moon
Overflowing among the constellations
Tell me the rest of the myth
Somehow tonight
Astronomical observation
FALL in Night

Whenever a star falls
Tweet your wish
Three times, before I can say it again
A disappearing meteor

Tomorrow is approaching little by little
Hey, look

The shining wind awakens
The shining sky turns purple
As the seasons pass by
A night when I want to be alone
Astronomical observation
FALL in STAR

Gazing at the white moon
Overflowing among the constellations
Tell me the rest of the myth
Somehow tonight
Astronomical observation
